title: E-commerce Product Description
scenario: Write a product description for an e-commerce website for a new smartwatch. The description should be 150-200 words, include the watch's key features, target a 25-45 age group, and be engaging.
constraints: Must include the watch's water resistance level and battery life.
Must include a call-to-action (CTA) at the end.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt adhere to the given constraints?
Is the tone conversational and engaging?
Are the key features and specifications of the smartwatch accurate?
